CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHELLE RIGHETTI'S Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770

Plaintiff Michelle Righetti's Motion for Request for Dismissal of Class Action Pursuant to California Rules of Court, Rule 3.770, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
